servinfo.title: CPP No.1 Switch Inspection and Adjustment (If Equipped)

ptxt.intxrefpoff: CPP No.1 Switch Removal and Installation (If Equipped)

servinfosub.title: Inspection
servinfosub.ptxt: Check for resistance between terminals under each condition below. If check result is not satisfactory, replace switch.

spec.title: CPP No.1 switch resistance
spec.ptxt: When switch shaft is pushed [A]: Continuity exists
When switch shaft is free [B]: No continuity

servinfosub.title: Adjustment
servinfosub.ptxt: With clutch pedal (1) depressed, adjust switch (2) position so that clearance “a” between end of thread and clutch pedal arm is within specification. Then tighten lock nut to specified torque.

spec.title: Clearance between end of thread and clutch pedal arm
